title: Traffic jam on N2 Highway
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Readers are warned about a...
bodyText:
KNYSNA NEWS - Readers are warned about a traffic jam after a driver lost control of his delivery truck on the N2 Highway near the Welbedacht turn-off  in Knysna.

No one is injured and the Knysna Fire Department and police are currently on the scene.


> Traffic officials are busy regulating the traffic at present.


Motorists are asked to be patient when using this road.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
